title: PlayTime NV
description: A simple plugin for displaying and identifying the top players on your server by time played
body:
PlayTime Paper is a plugin for Bukkit and Paper (its forks) to display and identify the top players by time played. 

**/playtime** - Shows full statistics of your game. From the time you joined the server to the number of visits 
**/playtime top** - Shows the top 10 players on your server by time played. 

**/playtime** <nickname> Shows player statistics

**/playtime reload** - Reload the plugin. 

**/uptime** - Uptime server.

The plugin has a beautiful and user-friendly interface for complete customization.
